titleStmt.title: SII 33.153: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 153. (A.R. No. B 258 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Pāpavināśēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1569 • • • śu. 15, Monday corresponding to 1647 A.D.

Damaged. Records the gift of a gold plate, 2000 ṭaṁkas, horses and umbrellas to the god Mallikhārjunadēva by Sthānapati Pedagaṅga-Jiyya. Further, it records the gift of some lands in the village Malkāyapalli to the gods Surabhēśvara, Pāpavināśadēva and Rāmayadēva of Sattevōlu and records the levy of fee on marriages and Vaḍugu (U panayanam)-ceremonies performed in these three temples.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī
1569 Agunēṭi
su 15 sō svasti śrī śrī
śrīliṁga cakravartti śrī maṁ
gadēva divyaśrīpādapadmārādha
tamu mīṁdi divā pṛthivī mahā ma
mayina bhikṣāvritti siddayadēvayya
nā sa dēvara sthānapati pedagaṁga jiyya
jiyyagāru dēvarāyaniṁkki puṁṇyamugā
mallikārjunadēvaraku payiṁḍi paḷemu seyiṁcci
ni reṁḍuvēla ṭṭaṁkālu celliṁstēnu peṭṭina tējamāṁ
muguṟamuṁnnu goḍaguṁnnu peṭṭi surabhēsvaradē
vara pāpavināśana dēvara sattevrōli rāmayadēvara
yī mūṁḍu dēvasthānālakuṁnnu peddavānigā jē
si gaṇācārinna yē vīramuṣṭipaṁnnu sarvamānyaṁjē
si yunnaṭi pūrvvamayina vrittipāḷugāka samudāya
mu pāḷalōnu pāpavināśanamu dēvaraku jeḷē Aṭu
malkāyapalli grāmastaḷamaṁdu velicēnu yiruvu
ṭiṁnni varimaḍi yinu maruturu nīrunēlānu vrittigā
nu devākapṛthvikalaṁttāgālamunnu mallikhārjjunaṁ devara saṁ
nnitini maniṁci Ācaṁdrakka stāhigānu yistimi yīmūṁ
ḍu devastānālalonuṁnu vaḍugunnu peṁḍlini Āyinappū
ḍu kaṭnaṁ yistimi yiṁttavaṭṭuku yavvaru Upahati
cesinānu gaṁgakaṟatanu govuhatya braṁhmā hatyacēsi
na pāpāna bovuvāru . svadatta dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
rā dattanupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ ni
ṣphalaṁ bhavet . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī bikṣa vritti
hāyyaṁgāri Ōju . Anaṁdapuraṁ virāyabū
ni koḍuku kāse mayesvari vēsina sasanaṁ
Digital edition of SII 33.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
